name: Get the Ref
effect: Each team gains a free Bribe.

name: Time-out!
effect: Both teams shift their turn marker one space.

name: Solid Defence
effect: The kicking team may set up D3+3 of its open players again.

name: High Kick
effect: One open player on the receiving team may be moved into the ball's landing square.

name: Cheering Fans
effect: Each coach rolls D6 + Cheerleaders; the winner gets a +1 assist on their first block next turn.

name: Brilliant Coaching
effect: Each coach rolls D6 + Assistant Coaches; the winner gains a free team re-roll for this drive.

name: Changing Weather
effect: Roll again on the Weather table; the new result applies for the rest of the drive.

name: Quick Snap!
effect: The receiving team may move D3+3 of its open players one square each.

name: Charge!
effect: The kicking team may give D3+3 of its open players a free Move, [[blitz|Blitz]] or Throw.

name: Dodgy Snack
effect: Random players risk a characteristic penalty for the drive.

name: Pitch Invasion
effect: Both coaches roll D6 + Fan Factor; the lower roll has D3 random players knocked [[prone|Prone]] and [[stunned|Stunned]].
